title: Rig Veda 7.49: Hymn to the Waters
description: From the Rig Veda — the oldest scripture in any Indo-European language.
introduction: From the Rig Veda — the oldest scripture in any Indo-European language.

translation.text: The waters from heaven, from earth, and those dug — may those divine waters protect me. In the midst of the waters is the Lord.
